---
title: "Import Data 2023-03-07"
author: "Andrii Hovorov"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
---

## About 
This is Qmd document for importing Noradrenaline project patch data

```{r setup}
library(readABF)
library(tidyverse)
```

## Cell: 2023_03_07

First, let's just import one file

```{r import_file}

example_file <- readABF("../data/2023-03-07/2023_03_07_0001.abf")

```


```{r}

example_file

```
